message:
test: add 6 deterministic E2E scenario playback tests (2dccg.11.3)

Unit-test-level E2E scenarios with replay_scenario() helper for
multi-step interaction flows: search→select→detail, theme switching,
density cycling, palette open/close, help overlay lifecycle, and a
perf gate ensuring all scenarios complete under 1s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
